ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If this is off, don't trigger on
ast.target: 如果关闭此选项，则不会在

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: With this setting on, the following will apply:
ast.target: 启用此设置后，以下规则将适用：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Don't trigger on dataview inline fields:
ast.target: 不要在 dataview 内联字段上触发：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If this is turned on, searching for

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: will find the same results as

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Emoji autocomplete will appear everytime you type : followed by a letter. This will help you insert emojis. (Might not work on mobile)
ast.target: 每次输入 : 后跟一个字母时，都会出现表情符号自动补全。这将帮助您插入表情符号。（在移动设备上可能无法使用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlight the part of the suggestion that is matched in accent color.
ast.target: 用强调色高亮显示建议中匹配的部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: E.g. Searching for 'shuffle' will find 🔀 (twisted_rightwards_arrow). Tags may sometimes be vague or unintuitive.
ast.target: 例如，搜索 'shuffle' 会找到 🔀 (twisted_rightwards_arrow)。标签有时可能模糊或不直观。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When an emoji is matched by it's tag, show the shortcode next to it. Helps you learn the proper shortcodes. When disabled, looks cleaner.
ast.target: 当表情符号通过其标签匹配时，在其旁边显示短代码。帮助您学习正确的短代码。禁用时，界面更简洁。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Suggester will boost recently used emoji
ast.target: 建议器将优先显示最近使用的表情符号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unsupported emoji will not be suggested in the picker
ast.target: 不支持的表情符号不会在选择器中被建议

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will clear the supported/unsupported status of all emoji and re-check them.
ast.target: 这将清除所有表情符号的支持/不支持状态并重新检查它们。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this is turned on, upon submitting a completion, an emoji will be immediately inserted. Otherwise, a shortcode will be inserted and you only see the emoji in Preview Mode.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，在提交补全时，将立即插入一个表情符号。否则，将插入一个短代码，您只能在预览模式下看到表情符号。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 更严格的自动补全触发

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 高亮建议中的匹配部分

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 通过标签建议表情符号

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在标签结果中显示短代码

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 建议最近使用的表情符号

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 隐藏不支持的表情符号

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 重新检查表情符号支持

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 更好的旗帜表情符号（实验性）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Disable this if autocomplete is sometimes not triggering when it should.
ast.target: 如果自动补全有时未能按预期触发，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Replaces all flag emoji with a custom font
ast.target: 用自定义字体替换所有旗帜表情符号

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Windows 10 is known to have bad flag emoji, this fixes it. More info:
ast.target: 已知Windows 10的旗帜表情符号显示不佳，此功能可修复。更多信息：

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Might break some themes or other plugins!
ast.target: 可能会破坏某些主题或其他插件！

ast.name: setText
ast.source: If glitched, reload obsidian or change the Text Font in Appearance
ast.target: 如果出现故障，请重新加载Obsidian或在外观设置中更改文本字体

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 请在以下地址报告任何错误：
